input.content:
Welcome to nano-agent!

nano-agent is a minimal LLM coding agent.
Built for learning the raw loop of: observe → think → act.

To get started with nano-agent, run:
  uv run agent run "your task here"

nano-agent does not use frameworks — just the Anthropic SDK directly.
